transcript: Speaker A: So, what kind of music do you vibe with? Speaker B: Vibe? Athentha? [Vibe? What's that?] Uh... I... like... music... very much. English ariyathath kond njan pala dates-um lose cheythittundu. [Because I didn't know English, I have lost many dates.] Pakshe ippo scene maari. [But now the scene has changed.] Ippo ente mobile-il SpeakX undu! [Now I have SpeakX on my mobile!] AI njan parayunnath kettittu appol thanne ente mistakes correct cheyyum. [The AI listens to what I say and corrects my mistakes immediately.] Athellam ente native languages-il explain cheyyukayum cheyyum. [It also explains everything in my native languages.] Njan courses-um coaching classes-um vendi ayirangal spend cheythittundu. [I have spent thousands on courses and coaching classes.] Pakshe ithreym oru easy solution njan kandittilla. [But I haven't seen such an easy solution.] Daily just 15 minutes mathi... athum oru coffee-inde price-il! [Just 15 minutes daily is enough... that too at the price of a coffee!] Speaker C: Download SpeakX now, available on Play Store and App Store.
on_screen_text: "So, what kind of music do you vibe with?" "Vibe? Athentha?" [Vibe? What's that?] "Uh... I... like... music... very much." "English ariyathath kond njan pala dates-um lose cheythittundu." [Because I didn't know English, I have lost many dates.] "Pakshe ippo scene maari." [But now the scene has changed.] "Ente mobile-il ippo SpeakX undu!" [Now I have SpeakX on my mobile!] "AI njan parayunnath kettittu appol thanne ente mistakes correct cheyyum." [The AI listens to what I say and corrects my mistakes immediately.] "athellaam ente native languages-il explain cheyyukayum cheyyum!" [and explains everything in my native languages!] "Njan courses-um coaching classes-um vendi ayirangal spend cheythittundu." [I have spent thousands on courses and coaching classes.] "pakshe ithreym oru easy solution njan kandittilla." [but I haven't seen such an easy solution.] "Daily just 15 minutes mathi..." [Just 15 minutes daily is enough...] "athum oru coffee-inde price-il!" [that too at the price of a coffee!] "Speak normally ENGLISH", "SpeakX Key to Confidence", "Download Now"
summary: A man explains how his lack of English fluency caused him to lose dating opportunities. He introduces SpeakX as an affordable, AI-powered solution that corrects speech in real-time and explains concepts in native languages, prompting users to download the app.
